title: 60ft Rapid Deployment Portable Survival Cord Made with Kevlar 200lb Breaking
description:
The Rapid Deployment Cord Made with Kevlar is ideal for your survival kit. Made from 3 strands of Kevlar thread, it has a breaking strength of 200 lbs. This cord is coated in polyurethane, which gives it added abrasion and UV resistance. The new rapid deployment casing opens to easily release and recoil your Kevlar cord without the mess! Weighing less than a few ounces, the Kevlar survival cord is optimal for traps, bows, snares and more. This cord is a perfect addition to any emergency kit. Buy in bulk lengths for additional savings.
